娼館衣装を着たマニョリアは、不安そうに娼館の部屋で座っていた。:
Magnolia, dressed in a brothel outfit, sat nervously in the brothel
room.
どうした、不安なのか？: What's the matter? Are you nervous?
訊かれて、マニョリアは魔法植物を困ったように見つめ返す。:
When asked, Magnolia looked back at the magical plant with a
troubled expression.
そりゃそうだよ……<br>マニョ、初対面の人とお話しするの苦手だし……:
Well, of course... I'm not good at talking to people I've never met
before...
ああ、初めての人とどうやって話したらいいか分からないってか。<br>そういうこと:
Ah, so you don't know how to talk to someone you've just met. If
that's the case, just leave it to me!
マックンに任せてどうにかなるの？<br>あぁ……どうしよう……緊張してきちゃった:
Will leaving it to Makkun really help? Ah... what should I do... I'm
getting so nervous...
兄ちゃんとまたするときのための練習だと思えばいいんだよ。<br>それならがんばれ:
Just think of it as practice for when you're with big brother again.
Then you can do your best, right?
魔法植物のアドバイスに、マニョリアは目を輝かせた。<br>そして途端に前向きな表:
At the magical plant's advice, Magnolia's eyes lit up, and she
immediately changed to a positive expression and nodded.
